mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activity_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id as favorite_id, f.user_id, f.activity_id, f.favorite_time, ap.plan_name, ap.min_age, ap.max_age, ap.activity_category, ap.season, ap.duration, ap.scene, ap.status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_step s WHERE s.activity_plan_id = ap.id) AS step_count FROM activity_favorite f INNER JOIN activity_plan ap ON f.activity_id = ap.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
